title: 宝塚記念の後に・終わる春

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she ran with all she had, Sakura Chiyono
O's performance feels markedly different from
before. The other racers are still full of energy
even after the race, in stark contrast to her own
state.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, Sakura Chiyono O feels an unsettling
sensation, like she's starting to crumble. While
other racers are preparing their futures, she's
beginning to decay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Maruzensky continues to train. Even
if she can't return to her peak, she finds strength
in her desire to run with everything she's got in
the present.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup Sakura Chiyono O promised to
run in with Maruzensky is fast approaching, and
she decides to run in another G1 race to prepare
for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set the autumn Tenno Sho as her next goal
race. She also asks me to keep her condition a
secret, promising that she'll be okay.
